overall.description: First-person exploration through a cyberpunk industrial alleyway in a game engine. The player traverses metal walkways between corrugated buildings, enters a surveillance room containing a holographically-marked body, examines monitors, then exits and ascends stairs. Features high-quality rendering with neon UI elements and industrial aesthetics.

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk along a narrow elevated industrial walkway. To the left rises a massive elevated transit structure with billboards, while a corrugated metal building lines the right. The camera approaches a small surveillance shack marked by a red paper lantern.

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the dark surveillance shack, transitioning from natural to artificial lighting. Inside, a wall of monitors glows with data and surveillance footage. On the floor lies a body surrounded by a blue holographic outline, suggesting a crime scene investigation scenario.

segments.scene_description: The camera explores the interior of the surveillance room, panning across the surrounding walls covered in glowing monitors displaying various data streams. The holographic body remains highlighted on the floor as the player investigates the space.

scene_state.functional_zone: exiting surveillance room and ascending metal stairs

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the surveillance room back to the outdoor walkway, then turns to ascend a steep metal staircase. The monitors and body are left behind as the camera climbs toward an upper platform, with the elevated transit structure visible to the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bright industrial exterior into a dark, high-tech crime scene before ascending back into the open air. It begins with a walk along a narrow elevated walkway, flanked by a corrugated metal building and a massive transit structure adorned with billboards, moving toward a small surveillance shack marked by a red paper lantern. As the camera enters the shack, the lighting shifts from natural daylight to the artificial glow of a wall of monitors and a blue holographic outline surrounding a body on the floor. The scene then lingers within the cramped interior, panning across the data-filled screens and the highlighted corpse before turning back toward the exit. Finally, the camera leaves the room and ascends a steep metal staircase, climbing away from the investigation site toward an upper platform under the looming transit structure.
